title: Radix Healthcare | Best Hospital in East Delhi | Nirman Vihar
heading: Welcome to
description: Radix Healthcare is an 60 bedded multi-specialty hospital founded by a group of successful doctors and healthcare advocates of the country. Started in 2003, the hospital has ensured comfort, compassion, and cure to its patients for the last 22 years. Accredited with the prestigious NABH and NABL, Radix Healthcare is known for its quality and commitment to the healthcare industry throughout the national capital of India.

Select Doctors Select... Book an Appointment Director's Note Dr Ravi Malik SENIOR CONSULTANT PAEDIATRICIAN Director, Malik Radix Healthcare Private Limited “Prevention is better than cure. Health should be your priority. You can lose your money, but you must never lose your health. The relationship between doctors and patients is almost as strong as blood relations. Our doctors are available for you round the clock, we are always with you when you are vulnerable.” Director's Note Dr Renu Malik SENIOR CONSULTANT GYNAECOLOGIST Director, Malik Radix Healthcare Private Limited “Your health is your most valuable asset. Don’t let it be compromised by unforeseen circumstances or chronic diseases. That’s why you need a reliable and trustworthy partner who can provide you with the best health care services and support. Our doctors are more than just professionals, they are your friends and family. They are available 24/7 to attend to your needs and concerns. We are always by your side when you need us the most.” Meet Our SENIOR MANAGEMENT OF THE HOSPITAL Dr. Ritesh Malik Medical Doctor turned entrepreneur, World Economic Forum YGL Founder Innov8, Plaksha, Director Dr. Shruti Malik BDS | MDS | Endodontics Director Radix Healthcare Dr. T.P.S Kaith Medical Doctor Dr. Ashish Mittal CEO Radix Healthcare 23 Years Of Excellence in HealthCare Malik Radix Healthcare Private Limited is an 60 bedded multi-specialty hospital founded by a group of successful doctors and healthcare advocates of the country. Started in 2003, the hospital has ensured comfort, compassion, and cure to its patients for the last 23 years. Radix Healthcare is known for its quality and commitment to the healthcare industry throughout the national capital of India. ABOUT US CONTACT US PERSONALISED CARE At Malik Radix Healthcare Private Limited we provide a compassionate and caring experience to our patients and their families. We promise to deliver homely care to every patient. INTEGRITY We act ethically and are accountable in everything we do. Hence, we have created an honest and trustful environment through teamwork, professionalism, and mutual respect. INNOVATION We understand that improvements and innovations are essential with the change in time. Therefore, Malik Radix Healthcare Private Limited stays ahead of the curve by constantly creating innovation. EXCELLENCE At Malik Radix Healthcare Private Limited, we do the best. We work as a team with experience, advanced technology, and best practices to provide the highest-quality care for our patients and families. OUR MISSION Care with Smile & an Obsession for Patient Satisfaction Meet Our Professionals OUR RENOWNED DOCTORS We treat with compassion and ensure our patients feel comfortable and safe in the hands of our excellent doctors. Our doctors are available for you round the clock , We are always with you in need. Dr. Ravi Malik Paediatrician View Profile Dr. Renu Malik Gynaecologist View Profile Dr. Shruti Malik Dentist View Profile Dr. Ridhima Arora Dermatologist View Profile View Radix Doctors Of All Departments View More Radix Testimonials Got treatment by Dr. Sunny. The doctor was very polite and his medicine worked very well. The staff is well spoken and helpful. The hospital looks very nice and luxurious. It is a bit expensive. The only problem I had, was searching for a charging port for my phone everywhere. The receptionist said that the 2 out of 4 that were free were not working and could not find another one anywhere. Shradha Agrawal - 9 months ago Got satisfied service under Dr sunny. Hospital was very neat and clean. Doctors were very humble and supportive. Rooms were very beautiful. Kalpana Thakur - 3 years ago We had a very good experience at Radix Hospital. From the admission process to the delivery, everything was handled with care and professionalism. The doctors were very supportive and explained everything clearly, which made us feel comfortable and confident. The nursing staff was kind and attentive, always available whenever needed. The facilities are also well-maintained and clean. We are truly grateful as we have been blessed with a healthy baby girl. Thank you to the entire Radix Hospital team for making this special moment so smooth and memorable. Sunita Yadav - 9 months ago Our baby boy was born at Malik Radix Healthcare, and the entire experience was nothing short of wonderful. From the moment we arrived, we were treated with warmth, care, and professionalism.

A special heartfelt thank you to Dr. Renu Malik, whose expertise, calm guidance, and motherly care made the entire delivery process smooth and reassuring. She explained every step patiently, answered all our concerns, and made sure both mother and baby were safe and comfortable at all times.

We are equally grateful to Dr. Ravi Malik, whose constant support and reassuring words gave us immense confidence. His presence and advice during the post-delivery phase ensured our baby received the best possible start to life.

The nursing staff, ward boys, and support team were equally commendable — always attentive, compassionate, and quick to respond whenever needed. The cleanliness, organization, and facilities of Malik Radix Healthcare truly reflect their commitment to patient well-being.

We feel blessed to have chosen this hospital for one of the most important moments of our lives. Thank you, Dr. Renu Malik, Dr. Ravi Malik, and the entire team for giving us such a safe, happy, and memorable beginning with our little one. Ruhi Gupta - 9 months ago AWARDS AND CERTIFICATIONS HEALTH BLOGS Awareness Health Issues About Radix Posted on: 27/09/2023 Facial Exercises V/s Face lift cosmetic surgery Facial exercises are very popular these days in terms of being the best way to “tone” and “tighten” your skin. Just the way you work up your body to get the tight muscles, abs, or biceps at the gym, you cannot do the same with your skin. Unfortunately, the two concepts are very different from each other. In fact, facial exercises can be worse sometimes for your skin. Repetitive facial movements can contribute to signs of aging like fine lines, sagging skin, and wrinkles. Read more Tooth extraction for Diabetic patients! Is it safe? Perhaps the most unsavory way of life conditions to have in the present time and age is diabetes, where your body loses its capacity to control the glucose levels in your body.Diabetes-associated peripheral arterial disease can reduce blood flow to the surgical area, resulting in delayed recovery. Additionally, in patients who have poor control of their blood sugar levels, surgical wounds stand a higher chance of being infected, further delaying recovery. Read more Posted on: 27/09/2023 Diabetes-A Silent Killer Diabetes is a metabolic hormonal imbalance characterized by high blood glucose, also known as blood sugar level. Insulin is an essential hormone that regulates how the body uses and stores glucose and fat  in our body. Diabetes occurs if production of insulin in the pancreas reduces or stops, resulting in cells unavailable to absorb the glucose. As a result glucose starts to accumulate in blood instead of reaching vital organs leading to a state of hyperglycemia (high blood sugar level). It is very important for us to keep the soldiers that fight the foreigners intruders strong and active. This can only be ensured by boosting your immunity.
